plugins.name: ai-dev-workflow
plugins.description: Daily, stack-agnostic AI dev workflow — 2-mode (runs with OR without plugins). Skills: /init bootstrap, /sync context-load, /flow 8-phase plan->execute->verify->document loop (investigate-confirm-act gates; ClickUp or no-id intake), /wrap session close (built-in doc curation), /checkpoint mid-session resume. Plugins (Superpowers, context-mode, agentmemory) optional.
